AtmoNet
Dashboard Contribute API Docs

Contribute to AtmosNet

Share weather data from your phone and earn rewards. Help build the world's most accurate hyperlocal weather network.

1

Download the App

Get the AtmosNet mobile app for iOS or Android. Install and create your account in seconds.

2

Enable Sensors

Allow the app to access your phone's barometer and location. Data is anonymized and privacy-protected.

3

Earn Rewards

Contribute observations automatically or manually. Earn AtmosPoints for accurate data that passes validation.

🎁 Rewards System

📱
+10 pts
Valid Observation
Each validated barometric reading
🔥
+5 pts
Daily Streak
Bonus for consecutive days
⭐
+50 pts
Tier A Quality
High-accuracy observations
🌍
+25 pts
New Location
First observation in grid cell
🏆
+100 pts
Weekly Champion
Top contributor of the week
🎉
+500 pts
Milestone
1000 valid observations
12,847
Active Contributors
2.4M
Data Points
94%
Validation Rate
150M
Points Awarded

Download the AtmosNet App

Available on iOS and Android. Start contributing today and earn rewards while helping your community.

Download App (Coming Soon)

🔒 Privacy Protection

  • GPS coordinates rounded to 500m precision before transmission
  • Device IDs hashed with SHA-256 - no personal identification
  • Only barometric pressure and rough location shared
  • No names, emails, or phone numbers stored
  • Data aggregated and anonymized for weather models
  • You control when to contribute - auto or manual mode

AtmosNet - Decentralized Weather Intelligence
